meta.title: Coins - Simple Expense Tracker
meta.description: Track your expenses in just 30 seconds a day. Beautiful, simple, and smart expense tracking for iOS.

hero.title: Coins
hero.headline: Build Your Money Habit
hero.subtitle2: A few seconds a day is all it takes.

core.label: Core Experience
core.headline: Track in Seconds. Stay on Budget.
core.subtitle: Log expenses with a single tap. Set a monthly budget and get alerts before overspending.

calc.title: Built-in Calculator
calc.desc: Add up receipts on the fly

smart.label: Smart Features
smart.headline: See the Big Picture
smart.subtitle: Beautiful charts, smart suggestions, and widgets that keep you informed.

suggestions.title: Smart Suggestions
suggestions.desc: Add frequent transactions in two taps

pro.label: Go Pro
pro.headline: Unlock More Power
pro.subtitle: Advanced features for those who want the full picture.

forecast.title: Financial Forecast
forecast.desc: Predict future spending from your history

currency.title: Multi-Currency
currency.desc: Perfect for travel and international expenses

scan.title: Receipt Scanning
scan.desc: Snap a photo, let AI auto-fill

more.headline: And So Much More...
more.subtitle: Your data stays on your device and your iCloud — always private, always secure.
